claims.text: BTZSC is a comprehensive benchmark of 22 public datasets spanning sentiment, topic, intent, and emotion classification.
claims.source_quote: we introduce BTZSC, a comprehensive benchmark of 22 public datasets spanning sentiment, topic, intent, and emotion classification

claims.text: The systematic comparison encompasses 38 public and custom checkpoints across four major model families.
claims.source_quote: we conduct a systematic comparison across four major model families, NLI cross-encoders, embedding models, rerankers and instruction-tuned LLMs, encompassing 38 public and custom checkpoints

claims.text: Qwen3-Reranker-8B achieves macro F1 = 0.72 and sets a new state-of-the-art.
claims.source_quote: modern rerankers, exemplified by Qwen3-Reranker-8B, set a new state-of-the-art with macro F1 = 0.72

claims.text: Instruction-tuned LLMs at 4-12B parameters achieve competitive performance with macro F1 up to 0.67.
claims.source_quote: instruction-tuned LLMs at 4--12B parameters achieve competitive performance (macro F1 up to 0.67)

claims.text: Modern rerankers exemplified by Qwen3-Reranker-8B set a new state-of-the-art performance.
claims.source_quote: modern rerankers, exemplified by Qwen3-Reranker-8B, set a new state-of-the-art with macro F1 = 0.72

claims.text: Strong embedding models such as GTE-large-en-v1.5 substantially close the accuracy gap while offering the best trade-off between accuracy and latency.
claims.source_quote: strong embedding models such as GTE-large-en-v1.5 substantially close the accuracy gap while offering the best trade-off between accuracy and latency

claims.text: Instruction-tuned LLMs excel particularly on topic classification but trail specialized rerankers.
claims.source_quote: instruction-tuned LLMs at 4--12B parameters achieve competitive performance (macro F1 up to 0.67), excelling particularly on topic classification but trailing specialized rerankers

claims.text: NLI cross-encoders plateau even as backbone size increases.
claims.source_quote: NLI cross-encoders plateau even as backbone size increases

claims.text: Scaling primarily benefits rerankers and LLMs over embedding models.
claims.source_quote: scaling primarily benefits rerankers and LLMs over embedding models

claims.text: Early zero-shot text classification approaches have predominantly relied on cross-encoder models fine-tuned for natural language inference.
claims.source_quote: While early approaches have predominantly relied on cross-encoder models fine-tuned for natural language inference (NLI)

claims.text: Existing evaluations such as MTEB often incorporate labeled examples through supervised probes or fine-tuning.
claims.source_quote: Existing evaluations, such as MTEB, often incorporate labeled examples through supervised probes or fine-tuning

claims.text: BTZSC captures diverse domains, class cardinalities, and document lengths.
claims.source_quote: a comprehensive benchmark of 22 public datasets spanning sentiment, topic, intent, and emotion classification, capturing diverse domains, class cardinalities, and document lengths

claims.text: BTZSC and accompanying evaluation code are publicly released.
claims.source_quote: BTZSC and accompanying evaluation code are publicly released to support fair and reproducible progress in zero-shot text understanding

claims.text: Recent advances in text-embedding models, rerankers, and instruction-tuned large language models have challenged the dominance of NLI-based architectures.
claims.source_quote: recent advances in text-embedding models, rerankers, and instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) have challenged the dominance of NLI-based architectures
